svg.title: Prototype ancestor of Coordinate Agents: orchestrating a long multi-agent greenfield build
svg.desc: This historical prototype preceded the current coordinate-agents skill. The lead agent preserves product intent through four stages: orient the build with user pins, prior art, and predecessor triage; author the ethos, specification, subsystem designs, and frozen interfaces; test those documents with author and independent playthroughs; then run one builder per subsystem through review, fixes, mechanical gates, instrumented feedback, and human judgment.
svg.text: ORCHESTRATING GREENFIELD BUILDS
PROTOTYPE ANCESTOR
Input: a product idea, user decisions, quality bar, and optional predecessor.
The lead delegates research and execution, but keeps judgment and authorship.
1 · ORIENT BEFORE CHOOSING A STACK
Capture pins
Record audience, platform, tone, scope, and quality decisions as they arrive.
Research prior art
Parallel agents compare the landscape; the lead rules: adopt, adapt, or build.
If a predecessor exists, mine it as evidence
Verify platform facts · re-test observations · keep wrong-approach patches as symptoms.
2 · MAKE THE DIRECTION DURABLE
The lead authors the document stack
ETHOS (how to think) → SPEC (what to build) → DESIGN DOC (one per system)
Use rival panels only for make-or-break systems
Designers pitch; judges score; the lead records rulings, grafts, and rejections.
Freeze interfaces before consumers exist
Version event vocabularies, publish consumer contracts, and make constants data.
3 · TEST THE DOCUMENTS BEFORE CODE
Run two complete mental playthroughs
Author trace + firewalled cold reader → moments, seams, inventions, exploits.
Diff the traces and amend the binding documents before implementation.
4 · EXECUTE EACH SYSTEM AGAINST ITS DESIGN
Deep builder → two reviewers → fix → mechanical gates
Review design fidelity and code law in parallel; then typecheck, lint, and build.
Turn subjective feedback into replayable evidence
Deterministic core + input recorder + marker key + headless replay.
Keep the cadence legible
Humans judge feel; agents verify facts; commit essays preserve the design narrative.
OUTPUT + COMPLETION
Durable decisions · binding designs · verified systems · replayable feedback
Complete when each system meets its design, mechanical gates pass, and the human quality gate passes.
orchestrating-greenfield-builds
current coordination skill → coordinate-agents
